title: Mental Health Evaluation * Homelessness Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Mental Health Evaluation * Homelessness Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Adolescents Children Adolescents Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues AIDS/HIV Issues Children Domestic Violence Issues Grade School Students Hispanic/Latino Community Homelessness Issues Immigration Issues Infants/Toddlers LGBTQ2+ Issues Native American Community Older Adults Perinatal Depression Veterans Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF WHITE BIRD CLINIC NEST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps individuals access primary medical care, case management, advocacy, outpatient drug and alcohol treatment, drug detox, mental health evaluation, counseling, SSI/SSDI assistance from a public benefits specialist, OHP application assistance, and transportation to appointments. 323 E 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing homelessness Hours: Walk in services: Monday-Friday 9:30am-noon Scheduled case management appointments: Monday-Friday 1pm-4:30pm Reception and phone assistance: Monday-Friday 9:30am-3pm Email (541) 342-1295 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WHITE BIRD CLINIC NEST
